creator: mcf@dmu.ac.uk
text:
On Wed, 20 Dec 2000, Michael C . Wu wrote:

> On Wed, Dec 20, 2000 at 10:27:37PM +0000, mcf@dmu.ac.uk scribbled:
> | >Number:         23700
> | >Category:       kern
> | >Synopsis:       AMD 756 Power Management Controller / SMBus driver
> | >Confidential:   no
> | >Severity:       non-critical
> | >Priority:       medium
> | >Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
> | >State:          open
> | 
> 
> Do you mind generating a diff against -current in addition
> to simply putting the tarball on http for easier fetching?

No problem. I've put it at:

http://www.3d-med.cse.dmu.ac.uk/~mcf/amdpm_oldpci.tar.gz

Diffs have been generated against -CURRENT cvsup'd at approx. 10pm on
Wednesday.

Note that I've been trying to write a newbus version of this, when I found
out that it had been using `old-style compatability shims'. I'm rather new
to all this, and am only just beginning to get to grips with the bus
stuff. As soon as it works, I'll post the newbus driver.

/\\att

--
Dr. Matthew C. Forman                          mcf@dmu.ac.uk
Faculty of Computing Sciences and Engineering
De Montfort University, Leicester, UK.
